training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.perturbation_side: parent residual MLP with training-time feature dropout augmentation
pipeline_program.target_side: dense all-target logits preserving official target order
pipeline_program.head: parent dense all-target logits
pipeline_program.training_strategy: focal_loss inherited from base_config plus feature dropout augmentation
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: feature/gene-dropout style robustness augmentation without label or split changes

augmentation.applies: training forward pass over cached perturbation embedding features
